report.summary: Hourly cycle-close: no delta since prior cycle — VM disk full blocks all builds/deploys. 46 pages published earlier today (queue drained). Git lock Day 10 deploy gap (~163 pages) remains critical. All 6 API routes structurally healthy in code review.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: NO DELTA: No new pages built or published since last cycle (VM disk full, no git activity possible)
45/46 pages published today verified — all have page.tsx files in src/app/
CONFIRMED MISSING: /tools/funding-rate-tracker — in PUBLISHED_PAGES (batch 12) but no page.tsx exists
Ecosystem pages (pendle, rocketpool, makerdao, yearn, ondo) present but lack server-side Metadata exports (use client)
PUBLISH_QUEUE drained to 0 — all content promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (~445+ unique routes)
Duplicate entries detected in PUBLISHED_PAGES: /tools/staking-rewards, /tools/crypto-calendar, /tools/onchain-analytics appear twice
56 published slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets, taxes, investing/best — unchanged from prior cycle)
TypeScript: 46 errors across 3 files — unchanged (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds)
No new regressions introduced this cycle beyond pre-existing issues
BLOCKER: VM disk full (ENOSPC) — unable to run npm run build or npx tsc --noEmit
Live site health check unavailable — egress proxy blocks degen0x.com fetches

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: NO DELTA: API route code unchanged since last cycle
All 6 public API routes verified structurally: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Cache TTLs correct: prices (60s), trending (5m), fear-greed (10m), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5m), defi-yields (5m)
Fallback resilience: market-dominance strongest (stale cache → hardcoded), defi-yields weakest (no fallback, returns 500)
market-metrics uses Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation with realistic mock fallback
Health endpoint (/api/health) operational with 100 req/min rate limiting and 3-service checks
Rate limiter coverage: only /api/health protected — 0/6 core data routes have rate limiting
CoinGecko free tier (no API key visible) — rate limit risk on traffic spikes unmitigated

sections.title: DevOps
items: NO DELTA: No deployments possible — VM disk full + git locks persist
CRITICAL: Git lock files persist Day 10: .git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock — 786+ uncommitted files
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — deploy gap ~163+ pages LOCAL-ONLY since
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push
VM disk completely full (ENOSPC) — even bash tmp dir creation fails. Blocks ALL operations
Security headers configured: X-Content-Type-Options, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, Referrer-Policy
Cache strategy: static assets immutable (31536000s), pillar pages 24h CDN, middleware gates indexing
